creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
In ports 86d1aa3caa24c97cdc63962d13fef16be12c84b7, an entry to VuXML was added for www/firefox, www/firefox-esr, and mail/thunderbird.  It looks like the mail/thunderbird entry has a typo (copy/paste from the firefox-esr entry perhaps) where the version specifier "< 128.3.0,1" probably should be "< 128.3.0" without the ,1 port epoch.  mail/thunderbird has never had PORTEPOCH set.

The most recent advisories (https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/security/advisories/) indicate that thunderbird 128.3 is fixed for the vulnerabilities mentioned in the VuXML entry.
